blended.narrative: 49 Degrees North is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,127 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
